name: Radiance
description: A divine weapon that causes damage and a bright burning effect that lays waste to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Burn
abilities.description: When active, scorches nearby enemies, dealing magical damage over time. Cooldown: 0. Mana Cost: 0. Radius: 650. Damage per Second: 60. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Damage per Second: 35. Burn applied by illusions deals less damage.
